description: Shared TS<->Rust parity fixture for the sensitive-file basename check. The TypeScript isSensitiveBasename (packages/shared/src/index.ts) and the Rust is_sensitive_basename (crates/runtime/src/sandbox.rs) each hand-maintain the same pattern list; a file whose basename is `sensitive: true` must never be read/exposed. Both backends assert this fixture, so adding a pattern to one without the other breaks the build. Note the checks are case-SENSITIVE by design (matched against real on-disk basenames).
